name: Oyster Crackers
recipeIngredient: 1 package Hidden Valley Ranch dressing mix
recipeInstructions:
1 In a large bowl, combine the spices with the oil.
2 Add the oyster crackers and stir until well mixed.
3 Spread the mixture in a jelly roll pan or other large pan with sides.
4 Bake at 250°F for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5 Cool before serving.
